---
title: "IBM Neuro-Symbolic AI Summer School Day 1: Universal Logic Knowledge Base (Uceda-Sosa)"
description: "ULKB — federating Propbank, Verbnet, Wordnet, WikiData, ConceptNet via Semantic Web tech. High-order logic in Python."
author: "synesis"
date: "2022-08-10"
categories: [NLP, NLU, knowledge graphs, conference]
image: cover.jpg
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![IBM Neuro-Symbolic AI Summer School 2022. Image from [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](cover.jpg)

![Slide from the [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](02.jpg)

![Slide from the [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](03.jpg)
:::
IBM NeuroSymbolicAI Summer School 2022 Day 1: Universal Logic Knowledge Base (ULKB) given by Rosario Uceda-Sosa:

* A knowledge graph and language that federates open source linguistic, logic and ontological KnowledgeBases using Semantic Web technologies.

* Linking Propbank, Verbnet, Wordnet, WIkiData and ConceptNet.

* Featuring high-order logical language that is in essence a typed lambda calculus (Python).

Opensource coming soon at: <https://github.ibm.com/IBM-Research-AI/ULKB>

Summer School site: <https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_ibm-neurosymbolicai-logic-activity-6963176028005433344-aNjX).*
